description: The curated pixel-parity corpus: the user's OWN Wallpaper Engine wallpapers, tiered by capability. We version ONLY this manifest (workshop ids + capability tags + reference-frame hashes) — never the copyrighted pixels/assets (see .gitignore).

fields.id: Steam Workshop id (folder name under content/431960/<id>)
fields.title: human label (no need to match WE exactly)
fields.capabilities: tags driving which gate applies: static, shaders, particles, audio, parallax, timeline
fields.reference_frames: list of { name, sha256 }; name matches the capture sub-case (static, t=2.0s, mouse=…, audio=tone440). sha256 filled by parity/tools/register_frames.py (Phase 3).

entries.title: (example) a video wallpaper
entries.notes: Replace with a real owned video wallpaper. Video tier expects SSIM >= 0.995.

entries.title: (example) a web/WebGL wallpaper
entries.notes: Replace with a real owned web wallpaper.

entries.title: (example) a scene wallpaper with particles + audio + parallax
entries.notes: Replace with a real owned scene wallpaper. Particles/audio use distribution metric (~0.88).
